Ntc Of Motion And Motion To Compel
Off Calendar Oct-31-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Katy Bersamin's motion to compel responses to form interrogatories and request for production of documents is moot as responses have been served. The Court makes no rulings as to the sufficiency of said responses. The Court finds that defendant failed to respond in a timely fashion. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $595 are to be paid within 15 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN
